summary: Iteration 7 testing completed successfully. All new features verified: Analytics time-series endpoint with period filter (week/month/quarter/year), Scoring configuration UI in Settings, Auto-list creation when prospect job runs, and EasyPanel deployment files (Dockerfiles, docker-compose, nginx.conf).

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - Recharts ResponsiveContainer issue when tab is not visible initially. Non-blocking but should be addressed for cleaner console.

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@spectraflow.com / Admin123!
GET /api/analytics/time-series?period=week returns time_series array (8 data points) + top_categories + quality_distribution
GET /api/analytics/time-series?period=month returns 31 data points
GET /api/analytics/time-series?period=quarter returns 91 data points
GET /api/analytics/time-series?period=year returns 366 data points
Time-series data includes leads, scored, rejected, jobs, contacts per day
Top categories structure includes name, count, avg_score
Quality distribution structure includes name, count
GET /api/settings/scoring returns scoring weights
PUT /api/settings/scoring saves custom weights and persists
Auto-list 'Prospeccion / {category} - Leads calificados' created when prospect job starts
Auto-list contains scored lead IDs
Dockerfile exists at /app/backend/Dockerfile (Python 3.11, uvicorn, port 8001)
Dockerfile exists at /app/frontend/Dockerfile (Node 20, nginx, port 3000)
docker-compose.yml exists with mongodb, backend, frontend services
nginx.conf exists with API proxy configuration
Analytics page: Evolucion tab shows time-series area chart
Analytics page: Period selector (week/month/quarter/year) works
Analytics page: Top Categories horizontal bar chart visible
Analytics page: Quality Distribution pie chart visible
Settings page: Scoring tab shows weight inputs
Settings page: Save Scoring button works (toast confirmation shown)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows console warnings when charts are in hidden tabs. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight or lazy loading charts.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_AutoList_Category prospect job for testing auto-list feature (cleaned up after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 features all working: 1) Analytics time-series endpoint (GET /api/analytics/time-series?period=week|month|quarter|year) returns daily data for leads/scored/rejected/jobs/contacts + top_categories + quality_distribution, 2) Scoring config endpoints (GET/PUT /api/settings/scoring) for customizing lead scoring weights, 3) Auto-list creation when prospect job starts - creates 'Prospeccion / {category} - Leads calificados' list with scored lead IDs, 4) Docker deployment files ready for EasyPanel: backend/Dockerfile, frontend/Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, frontend/nginx.conf

mocked_apis.Prospect job leads: Demo mode generates realistic Argentine business data

response_structure.time_series: Array of daily data points with date, label, leads, scored, rejected, jobs, contacts

auto_list_on_job.feature: Auto-create email list with scored leads when prospect job runs
